stooq.sample_rule: QQQ plus every tenth symbol in lexicographically sorted required symbols

timing.formation_close: First QQQ market close strictly after SEC acceptanceDateTime, using America/New_York 16:00.
timing.terminal_delisting_rule: If a selected security stops pricing and is absent from the next formation, carry its last adjusted value as cash until rebalance.

central_table.write_rule: Append one immutable source snapshot in one transaction after input gates pass.

stop_rule: Below 98% entry coverage, fewer than 49 priced positions in any formation, or missing QQQ calendar yields INPUT_BLOCKED without strategy returns.
